capacity_evidence.explanation: TP4 stores one of four KV heads per device. BFP8 cache accounting uses the physical 1,088-byte 32x32 tile: 1,024 pages x 1 head x 1 sequence tile x 8 head-dimension tiles = 8,192 tiles for each K or V cache per layer, or 499,122,176 bytes/device for K+V across 28 layers. With every full-model weight, embedding, final norm, TP-vocabulary LM-head, runtime buffer, and all 28 full-context caches resident, the frozen-source allocator run measured 2,730,875,392 bytes/device and 27,351,855,616 free bytes/device. The configured 512,000,000-byte trace region is reserved in each of eight DRAM banks before those allocator totals, or 4,096,000,000 bytes/device. Adding a separate 512 MiB transient reserve leaves 26,814,984,704 measured allocatable bytes/device. The public generator executed all 28 layers for a non-aligned 32,767-token request, owned padding to 32,768, filled sixteen 2,048-token chunks and all 1,024 logical pages, sampled two tokens, and replayed traced decode at position 32,767. The gate checked the final K and V page on every one of four ranks for every layer (224 device tensors), advanced both persistent position tensors to 32,768, and measured a 2,734,023,168-byte execution peak with 27,348,707,840 bytes/device free.

notes: The full model preserves the Hugging Face 32,768-token context at batch 1. No capability reduction is needed: complete model state plus full-context KV is 2.731 GB of the measured 30.08 GB/device allocatable after the 4.096 GB/device trace reservation. The 512 MiB transient reserve is additional. BFP8 rank-local paged KV, BFP4/LoFi TP4 projections, BFP8 attention/MLP and asynchronous CCL payloads, two shared persistent CCL buffers, and the replicated-mesh BF16 32-core L1 width-sharded inter-layer residual are unchanged. Batch 32 is serving-contract validated for mixed short prompts and heterogeneous decode positions, but full-context batch 32 is not advertised.

inter_layer_residual_contract.public_boundary_opt_out: Construct with return_sharded_decode_output=false only at a true host/public boundary.
inter_layer_residual_contract.non_aligned_logical_rows: Owned internally: rows are padded for tiled kernels and the logical output is sliced while retaining this device layout.

prefill.classification: Full model TP4: hidden-sharded embedding, 28 preserved optimized decoder layers, final norm and TP-vocabulary LM-head; generator-owned 128-token padding, 2,048-token page-aligned chunks, prompt masking, cache fill, position handling and output slicing

decode.classification: Full model TP4: rank-local paged_update_cache and decode SDPA with explicit persistent tokens, positions and fixed page table; BFP8 attention/MLP projection activations and persistent asynchronous BFP8 decode all-reduces; replicated-mesh BF16 width-sharded L1 residual; split model/sampling traces feed sampled tokens back on device
